dialogues.cn: 瓦列利安家族会找你算账的！
dialogues.en: House Velaryon is coming for you!

dialogues.cn: 海蛇会砍下你那该死的麻脸脑袋！
dialogues.en: The Sea Snake will have your poxy fucking head!

dialogues.cn: 不……不要啊！
dialogues.en: No... no!

dialogues.cn: 求你了！不！
dialogues.en: No! Please!

dialogues.cn: 去死吧 达哈尔亲王
dialogues.en: Fuck you, Prince Drahar.

dialogues.cn: 日你婊子老母！日你杂种老爹！
dialogues.en: Fuck your whore mother and bastard father!

dialogues.cn: 操！
dialogues.en: Fuck!

dialogues.cn: 不要啊！
dialogues.en: No!

dialogues.cn: 不
dialogues.en: No.

dialogues.cn: 戴蒙王子万岁！
dialogues.en: Hail, Prince Daemon!

dialogues.cn: 烧死这帮天杀的三城同盟会杂种！
dialogues.en: Burn the fucking Triarchy cunts alive!

dialogues.cn: 王子 我在这里！
dialogues.en: Here, my prince!

dialogues.cn: 救我！
dialogues.en: Save me!

dialogues.cn: - 直接回洞里去！  - 快回洞里！快！
dialogues.en: - Direct to the caves! - To the caves! Now!

dialogues.cn: 撤退！撤到洞里面！
dialogues.en: Retreat! Retreat to the caves!

dialogues.cn: 快回洞里！
dialogues.en: Back to the caves!

dialogues.cn: 你在哪？
dialogues.en: Where are you?

dialogues.cn: 出来面对我 达哈尔！
dialogues.en: Come out and face me, Drahar!

dialogues.cn: 快滚出来 达哈尔！
dialogues.en: Come out, Drahar!

dialogues.cn: 人躲哪里去了？
dialogues.en: Where are you?

dialogues.cn: 我要把你喂给你自己的螃蟹！
dialogues.en: I'm gonna feed you to your own crabs!

dialogues.cn: 你人呢？
dialogues.en: Where are you?

dialogues.cn: 他的头发像您 陛下
dialogues.en: He has your hair, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: - 他的头发确实像我 - 他的眼睛也像您 陛下
dialogues.en: - He does have my hair. - He has your eyes, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 说得没错
dialogues.en: Yes, he does.

dialogues.cn: 你的鼻子也很像我 是不是呀？
dialogues.en: And you have my nose, don't you?

dialogues.cn: 刚刚两岁 这孩子就已经生得一副帝王相了
dialogues.en: Two years old and already our boy has a kingly presence.

dialogues.cn: 或许吧 哥哥 不过今天早晨
dialogues.en: He may yet, brother but this morning he insisted

dialogues.cn: 他非要用手喝粥
dialogues.en: on eating porridge with his hands.

dialogues.cn: 他会长大的
dialogues.en: He will grow.

dialogues.cn: 都是因为他 这么多人聚集于此
dialogues.en: We've quite a party assembled in his honor.

dialogues.cn: 当然这次狩猎结束后 我们就有更多值得庆祝的事了
dialogues.en: And surely by the end of this hunt, we shall have more to celebrate.

dialogues.cn: 您说 有什么值得庆祝的事呢？
dialogues.en: And what is that, pray tell?

dialogues.cn: 这是伊耿的第二个命名日 他已经不再是小婴儿了
dialogues.en: It is Aegon's second name day. His infancy's behind him.

dialogues.cn: 就等韦赛里斯指定他为铁王座的继承人了
dialogues.en: It only remains for Viserys to name him heir to the throne.

dialogues.cn: 我可没这么确定
dialogues.en: I wouldn't be so sure.

dialogues.cn: 他是国王的长子
dialogues.en: He's the king's firstborn son.

dialogues.cn: 我觉得陛下还没有认清这件事
dialogues.en: I don't know that His Grace sees it so clearly.

dialogues.cn: 那就靠你来让他看清了……
dialogues.en: Then it lies with you to make him see it...

dialogues.cn: 首相大人
dialogues.en: Lord Hand.

dialogues.cn: 陛下
dialogues.en: Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 我从石阶列岛带来了急报
dialogues.en: I bring urgent news from the Stepstones.

dialogues.cn: 螃蟹喂食者被围困在血石岛后躲了起来
dialogues.en: The Crabfeeder has dug in for siege on Bloodstone

dialogues.cn: 同时他的部下趁着夜色摧毁我们的舰队
dialogues.en: while his men sabotage our fleet under cover of dark.

dialogues.cn: 泰兰 今天别提这个
dialogues.en: Not today, Tyland.

dialogues.cn: 只怕石阶列岛的事情万分火急
dialogues.en: The matter at the Stepstones is regrettably urgent.

dialogues.cn: 已经开战三年了 再等三天也无妨
dialogues.en: It's been three years. It can wait another three days.

dialogues.cn: 来吧……吃点东西
dialogues.en: Come... eat.

dialogues.cn: 弥补赶路的辛苦
dialogues.en: Fortify yourselves for the journey.

dialogues.cn: 别客气
dialogues.en: Please.

dialogues.cn: 补给车队准备好了吗？
dialogues.en: Is the baggage train ready?

dialogues.cn: 现在正在临河门集结
dialogues.en: It is presently massing at the River Gate.

dialogues.cn: 杰森公爵希望我们中午前抵达御林
dialogues.en: Lord Jason expects us in the Kingswood before midday.

dialogues.cn: - 你看见雷妮拉了吗？ - 没看到 陛下
dialogues.en: - Have you seen Rhaenyra? - I have not, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 三城同盟会的人躲进血石岛的洞穴
dialogues.en: With the Triarchy now sheltering in Bloodstone's caves

dialogues.cn: 龙的威胁大大降低了
dialogues.en: the threat of the dragons is blunted.

dialogues.cn: 他们没有步兵吗？
dialogues.en: They don't have foot soldiers?

dialogues.cn: 他们的雇佣兵已经陆续撤离了 陛下
dialogues.en: But their sellswords have been withdrawing in droves, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 就连他们也看得出这是场必败的战斗
dialogues.en: Even the mercenaries can see that it is a losing effort.

dialogues.cn: 雷妮拉在哪里？
dialogues.en: Where's Rhaenyra?

dialogues.cn: 我也不确定 陛下
dialogues.en: I cannot be sure at present, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 瓦列利安家族的军队消耗很严重 陛下
dialogues.en: The Velaryon forces have suffered heavy attrition, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 士兵之间已经怨声载道了
dialogues.en: The seeds of dissent are sown amongst the rank and file.

dialogues.cn: 戴蒙用兵太严苛
dialogues.en: Daemon has driven the men hard.

dialogues.cn: 士兵们开始质疑他的命令了
dialogues.en: They have begun to question his command.

dialogues.cn: 如果国王打算干预此事的话……
dialogues.en: If the crown were ever to intervene...

dialogues.cn: - 泰兰 - 现在是时候了
dialogues.en: - Tyland. - now is the time.

dialogues.cn: 戴蒙和海蛇未经陛下准许就擅自开战
dialogues.en: Daemon and the Sea Snake started their war without His Grace's leave.

dialogues.cn: 都过了这么久 如果国王现在干预
dialogues.en: Were he to intervene now, after so long

dialogues.cn: 会让我们显得软弱
dialogues.en: it would make the crown appear weak.

dialogues.cn: 七层地狱啊 谁能告诉我
dialogues.en: Can someone tell me

dialogues.cn: 雷妮拉到底在哪？
dialogues.en: where in the Seven Hells Rhaenyra might be?

dialogues.cn: 在巨龙眼皮底下
dialogues.en: Under the dragon's eye

dialogues.cn: 在巨龙眼皮底下
dialogues.en: Under the dragon's eye

dialogues.cn: 再来一遍
dialogues.en: Again.

dialogues.cn: 或许公主想听些别的歌谣？
dialogues.en: Perhaps the Princess might like to hear something else?

dialogues.cn: 不想 再唱一遍
dialogues.en: She would not. Play it again.

dialogues.cn: 她带着舰队和子民逃离
dialogues.en: She fled with her ships And her people

dialogues.cn: 心碎只为那……
dialogues.en: Her heart broken for those...

dialogues.cn: 王后陛下
dialogues.en: Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 我说停了吗？
dialogues.en: Did I say to stop?

dialogues.cn: 从头再来
dialogues.en: From the beginning.

dialogues.cn: 她带着舰队
dialogues.en: She fled with her ships

dialogues.cn: - 和子民逃离 - 雷妮拉？
dialogues.en: - And her people - Rhaenyra?

dialogues.cn: 怎么了 王后陛下？
dialogues.en: Yes, my Queen?

dialogues.cn: 大家都在外庭等你呢
dialogues.en: Your presence is wanted in the outer courtyard.

dialogues.cn: 王室狩猎马上要出发了
dialogues.en: The royal hunt readies to depart.

dialogues.cn: 我决定还是留在这读书
dialogues.en: I have decided to remain here and read instead.

dialogues.cn: 你可以走了 山姆威尔
dialogues.en: You may go, Samwell.

dialogues.cn: 公主命令你留下来
dialogues.en: You are to stay by order of the Princess.

dialogues.cn: 王后命令你立刻离开神木林
dialogues.en: The Queen commands you to leave the Godswood at once.

dialogues.cn: 告辞了 公主
dialogues.en: Princess.

dialogues.cn: 王后陛下
dialogues.en: Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 国王希望你可以加入我们
dialogues.en: The King wishes for you to join us.

dialogues.cn: 国王有很多值得庆祝的事 用不着我去
dialogues.en: The King has much to celebrate. He does not need me.

dialogues.cn: 他想要我们一起去
dialogues.en: He wants for us all to be together.

dialogues.cn: 或许狩猎会很有趣
dialogues.en: Perhaps the hunt could be fun.

dialogues.cn: 这是国王的命令吗？
dialogues.en: Is it the King's command?

dialogues.cn: - 是 不过…… - 那现在就走 王后陛下
dialogues.en: - Yes, but it... - Then at once, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 也不用这样的
dialogues.en: But it needn't be.

dialogues.cn: 说真的 我们大可不必如此 雷妮拉
dialogues.en: None of it needs be this way, in truth, Rhaenyra.

dialogues.cn: 看 这样不是挺好吗？
dialogues.en: Well, isn't this splendid?

dialogues.cn: 我们全家外出庆祝
dialogues.en: The whole of our family off to celebration

dialogues.cn: 并在御林中探险
dialogues.en: and adventure in the Kingswood.

dialogues.cn: 你现在这样适合外出吗？
dialogues.en: Should you be traveling in such condition?

dialogues.cn: 学士们说出来亲近大自然会有好处
dialogues.en: The maesters said that being out in nature would do me well.

dialogues.cn: 迟早你也会有你自己的孩子
dialogues.en: You'll be with your own child, sooner than late

dialogues.cn: 让我成为一个骄傲的外公
dialogues.en: and make me a proud grandsire.

dialogues.cn: 也没那么糟糕
dialogues.en: It's not so bad.

dialogues.cn: 怀孕是有点久 不过伊耿出生得很快
dialogues.en: The days are long but Aegon came quickly

dialogues.cn: 也没遇到什么麻烦
dialogues.en: and without fuss.

dialogues.cn: 今天你应该和我一同骑马外出
dialogues.en: You should ride out with me today.

dialogues.cn: 参加围猎
dialogues.en: Join in the chase.

dialogues.cn: 我不想
dialogues.en: I'd rather not.

dialogues.cn: 野猪在被猎杀的时候叫得像小孩子一样
dialogues.en: The boars squeal like children when they're being slaughtered.

dialogues.cn: 我不怎么喜欢
dialogues.en: I find it discomforting.

dialogues.cn: 这只是狩猎 雷妮拉
dialogues.en: It's a hunt, Rhaenyra.

dialogues.cn: 你想怎么参与?
dialogues.en: How would you like to participate?

dialogues.cn: 我也不知道为什么叫我去
dialogues.en: I'm not sure why I'm asked.

dialogues.cn: 因为你是我女儿 是公主
dialogues.en: Because you are my daughter. The Princess.

dialogues.cn: 所以你肩负责任
dialogues.en: And you have duties.

dialogues.cn: 所以我时刻被提醒这些
dialogues.en: As I am ceaselessly reminded.

dialogues.cn: - 什么？ - 所以我时刻都被提醒这些
dialogues.en: - I'm sorry? - As I am ceaselessly reminded.

dialogues.cn: 如果你积极参与的话就不需要提醒了
dialogues.en: You wouldn't need to be reminded if you ever attended to them.

dialogues.cn: 没人是为我而来的
dialogues.en: No one's here for me.

dialogues.cn: 万岁 万岁
dialogues.en: Hail, hail, Aegon

dialogues.cn: 征服者伊耿宝宝 二世！
dialogues.en: the Conqueror-Babe, Second of His Name!

dialogues.cn: 我是说殿下的第二个命名日！
dialogues.en: Here's to His Grace on his second name day!

dialogues.cn: 有消息说乔汉娜小姐被拐走了
dialogues.en: Lady Johanna was reported to have been abducted

dialogues.cn: 就在史文大人的船经过石阶列岛的时候
dialogues.en: when one of Lord Swann's ships sailed through the Stepstones.

dialogues.cn: 那乔汉娜小姐会怎么样？
dialogues.en: What will happen to Lady Johanna?

dialogues.cn: 她会被卖到自由城邦的青楼里
dialogues.en: She's to be sold to a pillow house in the Free Cities

dialogues.cn: 如果谣言是真的话
dialogues.en: if you believe the rumors.

dialogues.cn: 恐怕众神没把我造得适合狩猎
dialogues.en: I fear the gods did not make me for hunting.

dialogues.cn: - 我能与你们同坐吗 夫人们？  - 当然 一起坐吧
dialogues.en: - Might I sit with you, my ladies? - Of course, please join us.

dialogues.cn: 这位是拉里斯·斯壮 我们法务大臣莱昂诺的小儿子
dialogues.en: Larys Strong, the youngest son of our master of laws, Lord Lyonel.

dialogues.cn: 我夫君说还没有国王能
dialogues.en: My lord husband says that no king has ever been able

dialogues.cn: 长久地驯服石阶列岛
dialogues.en: to tame the Stepstones for long.

dialogues.cn: 那就是一片不毛之地 只适合野蛮人
dialogues.en: It's an inhospitable place, suited only for savages.

dialogues.cn: 或许公主殿下可以给我们讲讲
dialogues.en: Perhaps the Princess can give us some insight.

dialogues.cn: 哦 我不知道怎么说 我从没去过石阶列岛
dialogues.en: Oh, I'm not sure how I could. I've never been to the Stepstones.

dialogues.cn: 你亲爱的叔叔是这场战争背后的主使 是吗？
dialogues.en: Your dear uncle is the great mind behind this war, is he not?

dialogues.cn: 我不知道 我已经很多年没跟戴蒙说过话了
dialogues.en: I wouldn't know. I have not spoken to Daemon in years.

dialogues.cn: 自从你取代他成为王位继承人之后吧
dialogues.en: Since you supplanted him as heir.

dialogues.cn: 戴蒙自己做出的选择 凯拉夫人
dialogues.en: Daemon made his choices, Lady Ceira.

dialogues.cn: 公主更适合成为继承人
dialogues.en: The Princess was more suited to the role.

dialogues.cn: 他弄得一团糟 国王必须出面解决
dialogues.en: He's made a mess and the King must put an end to it.

dialogues.cn: 派出舰队和士兵 把三城同盟会清理干净
dialogues.en: Send fleets and men, and clear out the Triarchy for good.

dialogues.cn: 但是国王没有参战
dialogues.en: But the crown is not at war.

dialogues.cn: 王国已经参战了 公主
dialogues.en: The crown is at war, Princess

dialogues.cn: 虽然你父亲不肯承认
dialogues.en: though your father refuses to admit it.

dialogues.cn: 我们已经被你叔叔和海蛇拖进战争了
dialogues.en: We've been dragged into it by your uncle and the Sea Snake.

dialogues.cn: 那么您又是如何报效王国的呢 雷德温夫人？
dialogues.en: And how have you served the realm of late, Lady Redwyne?

dialogues.cn: 吃蛋糕吗？
dialogues.en: By eating cake?

dialogues.cn: 我很好奇 公主
dialogues.en: I wonder, Princess

dialogues.cn: 您的第二个命名日也有这么气派吗？
dialogues.en: was your own second name day as grand as this?

dialogues.cn: 说实话我一点也不记得了 伊耿也不会记得
dialogues.en: I honestly don't recall and neither will Aegon.

dialogues.cn: 我是杰森·兰尼斯特公爵
dialogues.en: Lord Jason Lannister.

dialogues.cn: 看到这么多狮子就猜到了
dialogues.en: I gathered that from all the lions.

dialogues.cn: 我们应该没有正式见过
dialogues.en: I don't think we've been properly introduced.

dialogues.cn: 您的双胞胎弟弟是我父亲的御前会议成员
dialogues.en: Your twin serves on my father's council.

dialogues.cn: 泰兰这个人...
dialogues.en: Tyland is...

dialogues.cn: 十分迟钝 诸神保佑他
dialogues.en: frightfully dull, Gods love him.

dialogues.cn: 这会是你尝过的最好的蜜酒
dialogues.en: The finest honeyed wine you'll ever taste.

dialogues.cn: - 当然 是兰尼斯港产的  - 当然
dialogues.en: - Made in Lannisport, of course. - Of course.

dialogues.cn: 御林 真是个好猎场
dialogues.en: The Kingswood, it's a fine hunting ground.

dialogues.cn: 但是最好的地方在凯岩城 我家附近
dialogues.en: But the best spot is to be found at Casterly Rock, near my home.

dialogues.cn: 你去过吗？
dialogues.en: Have you been?

dialogues.cn: 旅行时去过一次 小时候和我母亲一起
dialogues.en: Once. On tour, with my mother when I was young.

dialogues.cn: 说实话我也不怎么记得了
dialogues.en: And honestly can't recall much of that either.

dialogues.cn: 凯岩城的高度是旧镇参天塔的三倍
dialogues.en: The Rock is thrice the height of the Hightower in Oldtown.

dialogues.cn: 甚至比北境的绝境长城还高
dialogues.en: Taller still than the Wall in the north.

dialogues.cn: 据说如果天气足够好的话
dialogues.en: It's been said that if one were to stand in the tower

dialogues.cn: 站在塔顶能清楚地看到日落之海对岸
dialogues.en: on a perfect day, one could see clear across the Sunset Sea.

dialogues.cn: 那肯定很壮观
dialogues.en: It must be quite something.

dialogues.cn: 当然 我们没有龙穴 不过...
dialogues.en: We don't have a Dragonpit, of course, but...

dialogues.cn: 我有办法和资源能够建造一个
dialogues.en: I do have the means and resources to build one.

dialogues.cn: 你为什么要建龙穴？
dialogues.en: Why would you need a Dragonpit?

dialogues.cn: 当然是为了给龙安家
dialogues.en: To house dragons, of course.

dialogues.cn: 我会为了我的女王做任何事
dialogues.en: I'd do anything for my Queen...

dialogues.cn: 或者...为了夫人
dialogues.en: or... lady wife.

dialogues.cn: 感谢你的酒
dialogues.en: Thank you for the wine.

dialogues.cn: 这就是我对于你的价值？
dialogues.en: Is that what I am to you?

dialogues.cn: 给大贵族的奖赏？
dialogues.en: A prize to proffer about to the great houses?

dialogues.cn: 你到年龄了 雷妮拉
dialogues.en: You're of age, Rhaenyra.

dialogues.cn: 杰森·兰尼斯特是位佳偶
dialogues.en: Jason Lannister is an excellent match.

dialogues.cn: 他傲慢又自我
dialogues.en: He's arrogant and self-serious.

dialogues.cn: 那我以为你们在这方面倒是挺像
dialogues.en: Well, I thought you might have that in common.

dialogues.cn: 自从你成年以来
dialogues.en: Since you came of age

dialogues.cn: 全国各地的来信像河流汇集成湖
dialogues.en: I've been slowly drowning in a lake of parchment

dialogues.cn: 慢慢地快把我淹死了
dialogues.en: flowing from every corner of the realm.

dialogues.cn: 全是在提亲
dialogues.en: Marriage proposals, all.

dialogues.cn: 而且我多次试着跟你讨论这件事
dialogues.en: And I have tried, often, to discuss it with you

dialogues.cn: 可你每次都拒绝我
dialogues.en: but you've refused me at every turn.

dialogues.cn: 那是因为我不想结婚
dialogues.en: That is because I do not wish to get married.

dialogues.cn: 连我都必须屈服于传统和职责 雷妮拉！
dialogues.en: Even I do not exist above tradition and duty, Rhaenyra!

dialogues.cn: 打扰了 陛下
dialogues.en: Excuse me, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 你必须嫁人
dialogues.en: You must marry.

dialogues.cn: - 什么事？ - 王家猎手有消息
dialogues.en: - Yes? - The royal huntsman

dialogues.cn: 需要汇报 陛下
dialogues.en: has sent a report, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 有人目击到一头白色的雄鹿
dialogues.en: There's been a sighting of a white hart.

dialogues.cn: 那头鹿是御林之王 陛下
dialogues.en: The stag is the king of the Kingswood, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 一个献给伊耿王子命名日的帝王之兆
dialogues.en: A regal portent for Prince Aegon's name day.

dialogues.cn: 公主
dialogues.en: Princess.

dialogues.cn: 公主 等等！
dialogues.en: Princess, wait!

dialogues.cn: 公主 慢下来！
dialogues.en: Princess, slow down!

dialogues.cn: 公主！
dialogues.en: Princess!

dialogues.cn: 出什么事了？
dialogues.en: What happened back there?

dialogues.cn: 我的父亲
dialogues.en: My father.

dialogues.cn: 想把我卖给杰森·兰尼斯特
dialogues.en: Trying to sell me off to Jason Lannister.
Was...

dialogues.cn: 是不是我被册封为铁王座的继承人
dialogues.en: was I named heir to the Iron Throne

dialogues.cn: 只是为了用我来进一步提升
dialogues.en: so that I might only further raise the standing

dialogues.cn: 凯岩城公爵的地位？
dialogues.en: of a lord of Casterly Rock?

dialogues.cn: 您想让我杀了他吗？
dialogues.en: You want me to kill him?

dialogues.cn: 我们应该返回营地 公主
dialogues.en: We should return to camp, Princess.

dialogues.cn: 今天天气不错
dialogues.en: It's a beautiful day.

dialogues.cn: 我们应该逛逛御林
dialogues.en: We should take in the Kingswood.

dialogues.cn: 你订过婚吗 克里斯顿爵士？
dialogues.en: Were you ever betrothed, Ser Criston?

dialogues.cn: 我当然也曾是个热衷冒险的青年
dialogues.en: I had an adventurous youth

dialogues.cn: 那时我父亲在黑港侍奉
dialogues.en: when my father served at Blackhaven, to be sure.

dialogues.cn: 但是我的地位还够不上一门正式的婚约
dialogues.en: But my station was never high enough for a formal betrothal.

dialogues.cn: 在我宣誓成为御林铁卫之前
dialogues.en: Before I spoke my vows as a knight of the Kingsguard

dialogues.cn: 如果我想的话 可能会娶一个平民女孩
dialogues.en: I could have married a common-born girl had I wish.

dialogues.cn: 你能为自己的人生做主 真幸运
dialogues.en: How lucky you are to have a say in your own life.

dialogues.cn: 王国里很多人愿意您交换位置 公主
dialogues.en: Many in the realm would gladly trade positions with you, Princess.

dialogues.cn: 那只是因为他们不在我这个位置罢了
dialogues.en: Only because none of them has ever held my position.

dialogues.cn: 我虽然是龙石岛的公主 但却没有实权
dialogues.en: I may be the Princess of Dragonstone, but I am toothless.

dialogues.cn: 从前
dialogues.en: One day

dialogues.cn: 没几年前
dialogues.en: not so long ago...

dialogues.cn: 是您的权力把我的名字写进了白典
dialogues.en: you held enough power to write my name into the White Book.

dialogues.cn: 让您父亲册封我为御林铁卫
dialogues.en: When your father named me to his Kingsguard

dialogues.cn: 这是科尔家族从未有过的最高荣誉
dialogues.en: it was the highest honor any Cole had ever known.

dialogues.cn: 我所拥有的一切都是您给的
dialogues.en: All that I have, I owe to you.

dialogues.cn: 所以我可不认为您没有实权 公主
dialogues.en: Now I'd hardly call that toothless, Princess.

dialogues.cn: - 陛下  - 还有多远?
dialogues.en: - Your Grace. - How far?

dialogues.cn: 我们在东边半里格的地方发现它的粪便
dialogues.en: The droppings were found half a league to the east.

dialogues.cn: - 还是新鲜的  - 是两三小时前的 陛下
dialogues.en: - Still fresh. - Between two and three hours, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 我最好的探子看到它了
dialogues.en: My best scout spied him.

dialogues.cn: 这野兽重达35石 现在我们已经找到了它的踪迹
dialogues.en: The beast is upward of 35 stone, and we now have his trail.

dialogues.cn: - 是啊 - 在巨龙统治维斯特洛之前
dialogues.en: - Aye. - Before the dragons ruled over Westeros

dialogues.cn: 白鹿才是这片土地上王室的象征
dialogues.en: the white hart was the symbol of royalty in these lands.

dialogues.cn: 而且偏偏是在今天……
dialogues.en: And on this day, of all days...

dialogues.cn: 我从不迷信预兆 陛下
dialogues.en: I've never been one for signs and portents, Your Grace

dialogues.cn: 但如果诸神真的愿意表示眷顾……
dialogues.en: but if the gods did wish to show their favor...

dialogues.cn: 陛下
dialogues.en: Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 这是我家黄金长廊
dialogues.en: I had this forged in the Golden Gallery

dialogues.cn: 为伊耿王子打造的
dialogues.en: in honor of Prince Aegon.

dialogues.cn: 真是个好东西
dialogues.en: It's quite a thing.

dialogues.cn: 希望能用它给白鹿
dialogues.en: I hope it might provide the killing stroke

dialogues.cn: 刺出致命一击
dialogues.en: against your white hart.

dialogues.cn: 御林之王
dialogues.en: King of the Kingswood.

dialogues.cn: 好像七神也祝福了这一天
dialogues.en: It's as if the Seven themselves have blessed this day.

dialogues.cn: 感谢你的慷慨
dialogues.en: Thank you for your generosity.

dialogues.cn: 如果能娶雷妮拉公主为妻
dialogues.en: I would be honored...

dialogues.cn: 我将十分荣幸
dialogues.en: to take the Princess Rhaenyra to wife

dialogues.cn: 陛下
dialogues.en: Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 我能为您
dialogues.en: What I offer you

dialogues.cn: 为王室和您女儿提供力量
dialogues.en: the crown and your daughter, is strength.

dialogues.cn: 你觉得坦格利安家族还需要力量吗?
dialogues.en: Do you think that House Targaryen wants for strength?

dialogues.cn: 如果有人能够给您更多龙 您不要吗?
dialogues.en: If someone offered you more dragons, would you not take them?

dialogues.cn: 你能给我龙吗?
dialogues.en: Do you have dragons to offer?

dialogues.cn: 凯岩城是个富丽堂皇的地方
dialogues.en: Casterly Rock is a splendid seat.

dialogues.cn: 雷妮拉坐在我身边不会丢脸
dialogues.en: Rhaenyra may take her place there by my side without shame

dialogues.cn: 也能很好地弥补她身份地位的损失
dialogues.en: and feel herself well-compensated for her loss in station.

dialogues.cn: 她的身份地位有什么损失?
dialogues.en: What loss of station?

dialogues.cn: 如果您要册封小伊耿为继承人 陛下
dialogues.en: If you were to name young Aegon heir, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 我什么时候说要这样做了?
dialogues.en: And when would I be doing that?

dialogues.cn: 我只是以为……
dialogues.en: I had assumed...

dialogues.cn: 毕竟他是您的长子 我们很多人都认为……
dialogues.en: As he is your firstborn son, many of us had assumed...

dialogues.cn: 你说“我们很多人”
dialogues.en: "Many of us," you say.

dialogues.cn: 你的封臣质疑我对继承人的选择了吗?
dialogues.en: Have your bannermen questioned my choice of heir?

dialogues.cn: -  当然没有 陛下  - 如果有此等叛乱
dialogues.en: - Of course not, Your Grace. - It is your sworn duty

dialogues.cn: 你有责任上报给我
dialogues.en: to report rebellion stirring in my kingdom.

dialogues.cn: 叛乱? 没有这种事 陛下
dialogues.en: Rebellion? There has been nothing of the sort, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: -  我只是……  - 我不是一时兴起
dialogues.en: - I was only... - I did not decide to name Rhaenyra

dialogues.cn: 才决定册封雷妮拉为继承人
dialogues.en: my heir on a whim.

dialogues.cn: 王国里所有领主都最好牢记这点
dialogues.en: All the lords of the kingdom would do well to remember that.

dialogues.cn: 感谢你的礼物
dialogues.en: Thank you for the gift.

dialogues.cn: 陛下
dialogues.en: Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 上酒
dialogues.en: Wine.

dialogues.cn: 猎人发现踪迹了 陛下
dialogues.en: The huntsman has the trail, Your Grace

dialogues.cn: 已经派出了猎犬
dialogues.en: and has sent out the hounds.

dialogues.cn: 白鹿很快就会被逼入绝境了
dialogues.en: It won't be long now until the white hart is cornered.

dialogues.cn: 您的猎物唾手可得
dialogues.en: Your prize is within reach.

dialogues.cn: 您怎么看杰森大人的求婚?
dialogues.en: What do you make of Lord Jason's proposal?

dialogues.cn: 他真不是一般的傲慢
dialogues.en: That man's pride has pride.

dialogues.cn: 您不只是雷妮拉的父亲 您是国王
dialogues.en: You're not only Rhaenyra's father, you're the King.

dialogues.cn: 她会按照你的命令做的
dialogues.en: She will do as you command.

dialogues.cn: 我并不想命令她 奥托
dialogues.en: It is not my wish to command her, Otto.

dialogues.cn: 我只想让她快乐
dialogues.en: I want her to be happy.

dialogues.cn: 凯岩城之外还有一个选择
dialogues.en: There is another choice, beyond Casterly Rock.

dialogues.cn: 这个选择可能让你更好受些……
dialogues.en: One perhaps you might be more comfortable with, one...

dialogues.cn: 离家也更近些
dialogues.en: closer to home.

dialogues.cn: 你想的是谁？
dialogues.en: Who do you have in mind?

dialogues.cn: 伊耿王子
dialogues.en: Prince Aegon.

dialogues.cn: 这孩子才刚刚两岁 奥托
dialogues.en: The boy just turned two, Otto.

dialogues.cn: 是的 但这样就可以制止
dialogues.en: Yes, but it would cease

dialogues.cn: 那些络绎不绝向雷妮拉求婚的人了
dialogues.en: the endless proposals for Rhaenyra's hand.

dialogues.cn: -  给他们订下婚约……  - 我是来狩猎的
dialogues.en: - Betroth them... - I came here to hunt.

dialogues.cn: 不是来被这堆该死的政治游戏逼到窒息的
dialogues.en: Not to be suffocated by all this fucking politicking.

dialogues.cn: 那就不提这个了
dialogues.en: Let us speak no more of it.

dialogues.cn: 已经派人去找雷妮拉了 陛下
dialogues.en: We've sent out riders to find Rhaenyra, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 克里斯顿爵士跟着她呢
dialogues.en: Ser Criston went after her

dialogues.cn: 希望他们正在一起
dialogues.en: so the hope is that they are together.

dialogues.cn: 这姑娘太叛逆了
dialogues.en: The girl is a heedless contrarian.

dialogues.cn: 如果我反过来不准她嫁去兰尼斯特
dialogues.en: If I instead forbade her to wed a Lannister

dialogues.cn: 她一定会因为怨恨而跟杰森大人私奔
dialogues.en: she would have run off with Lord Jason out of spite.

dialogues.cn: 我真是个了不起的坦格利安国王啊
dialogues.en: A truly great Targaryen king I am.

dialogues.cn: 对自己十七岁的女儿感到无能为力
dialogues.en: Powerless over mine own daughter of seven-and-ten.

dialogues.cn: 杰赫里斯国王和平统治了半个世纪
dialogues.en: King Jaehaerys ruled over half a century of peace

dialogues.cn: 但孩子们快把他逼疯了
dialogues.en: while his children drove him to the edge of madness.

dialogues.cn: 尤其是女儿
dialogues.en: His daughters in particular.

dialogues.cn: 这是……传统 陛下
dialogues.en: It is... tradition, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 关于这件事 你想听听我的建议吗？
dialogues.en: Do you wish to hear my opinion on the matter?

dialogues.cn: 我猜一下？
dialogues.en: Should I guess?

dialogues.cn: 你认为你儿子 “碎骨人”哈尔温
dialogues.en: You believe that your son, Ser Harwin Breakbones

dialogues.cn: 七大王国最强壮的骑士
dialogues.en: the strongest knight in the Seven Kingdoms

dialogues.cn: 是雷妮拉最合适的人选
dialogues.en: is the best match for Rhaenyra.

dialogues.cn: 您抬举我了 陛下 但这不是我想说的
dialogues.en: You flatter me, Your Grace, but no.

dialogues.cn: 我认为最适合雷妮拉的人
dialogues.en: It would seem to me the best match for Rhaenyra

dialogues.cn: 是“海蛇”的儿子
dialogues.en: is the son of the Sea Snake

dialogues.cn: 兰尼诺爵士
dialogues.en: Ser Laenor.

dialogues.cn: 几年前 我建议你娶他姐姐为妻
dialogues.en: Some years ago, I counseled you to take his sister to wife.

dialogues.cn: 如今理由依然相同
dialogues.en: My reasoning remains the same.

dialogues.cn: 兰尼诺有纯正的瓦雷利亚血统
dialogues.en: Laenor is of pure Valyrian descent.

dialogues.cn: 他有您堂姐雷妮丝公主的血脉
dialogues.en: He shares blood with your cousin, the Princess Rhaenys

dialogues.cn: 他是王国内最富有家族的继承人
dialogues.en: and he is the heir to the wealthiest house in the realm.

dialogues.cn: 您两家的的裂痕
dialogues.en: The breach between your houses

dialogues.cn: 自我上次提起 至今也未见愈合的迹象
dialogues.en: has not narrowed since I last spoke of it.

dialogues.cn: 这样会大大减少外界对科利斯大人
dialogues.en: It would do much to assuage Lord Corlys

dialogues.cn: 或真或假的种种轻视
dialogues.en: of any slights, real or imagined.

dialogues.cn: 当然 我们得祈祷
dialogues.en: We must pray, of course

dialogues.cn: 兰尼诺能在石阶列岛战事中活下来
dialogues.en: that Laenor survives the fighting in the Stepstones.

dialogues.cn: 公主 我必须最后一次请求您返回营地
dialogues.en: Princess, I must make a final plea that we return to the camp.

dialogues.cn: 我更想呆在这
dialogues.en: I rather prefer it here.

dialogues.cn: 陛下一定非常担心您的缺席
dialogues.en: His Grace is certain to be worried by your absence.

dialogues.cn: 陛下要这么爱担心那就担心死吧
dialogues.en: His Grace can worry himself to death if he so likes.

dialogues.cn: 和我说说吧 克里斯顿爵士
dialogues.en: Tell me something, Ser Criston.

dialogues.cn: 你认为王国的臣民最终能接受我成为他们的女王吗？
dialogues.en: Do you think the realm will ever accept me as their Queen?

dialogues.cn: 臣民除了接受别无选择 公主
dialogues.en: They'll have no choice but to, Princess.

dialogues.cn: 您还好么 陛下？
dialogues.en: Is everything all right, Your Grace?

dialogues.cn: 你也知道 我……
dialogues.en: You know, I...

dialogues.cn: 我立她为王储是防止戴蒙荼毒王国
dialogues.en: I named her to protect the realm from Daemon.

dialogues.cn: 那时她是我唯一的孩子
dialogues.en: She was my only child.

dialogues.cn: 王国之光
dialogues.en: The Realm's Delight.

dialogues.cn: 我立她是出于爱……
dialogues.en: I named her out of love...

dialogues.cn: 因为我当时不再相信……
dialogues.en: because I no longer believed...

dialogues.cn: 不再相信什么了 亲爱的？
dialogues.en: Believed what, my love?

dialogues.cn: 我的很多先祖都是驭龙者
dialogues.en: Many in my line have been dragonriders.

dialogues.cn: 还有极少数是梦行者
dialogues.en: Very few among us have been Dreamers.

dialogues.cn: 龙的力量跟预言的力量相比算什么？
dialogues.en: What is the power of a dragon next to the power of prophecy?

dialogues.cn: - 时辰很晚了 夫君 - 雷妮拉很小的时候……
dialogues.en: - The hour is too late, husband. - When Rhaenyra was a child...

dialogues.cn: 我做过一个梦
dialogues.en: I saw it in a dream.

dialogues.cn: 我看到了 真切得像这篝火一样
dialogues.en: As vivid as these flames, I saw it.

dialogues.cn: 我的妻子产下一名男婴
dialogues.en: A male babe, born to me

dialogues.cn: 头戴征服者的王冠
dialogues.en: wearing the Conqueror's crown.

dialogues.cn: 我太希望这梦能成真
dialogues.en: I so wanted it to be true.

dialogues.cn: 希望自己也是个梦行者
dialogues.en: To be a Dreamer myself.

dialogues.cn: 我企图重现那个梦 夜复一夜
dialogues.en: I sought that vision again, night after night

dialogues.cn: 但它再也没出现过
dialogues.en: but it never came again.

dialogues.cn: 我把心思和意念都倾注在它上面
dialogues.en: I poured all my thought and will into it

dialogues.cn: 我的魔怔最终害死了雷妮拉的母亲
dialogues.en: and my obsession killed Rhaenyra's mother.

dialogues.cn: 韦赛里斯
dialogues.en: Viserys.

dialogues.cn: 我以为雷妮拉能带我走出悲伤和悔恨的深渊
dialogues.en: I thought Rhaenyra was the way out of my abyss of grief and regret.

dialogues.cn: 把她立为继承人能让一切恢复如初
dialogues.en: That naming her heir would begin to set things right.

dialogues.cn: - 一切都恢复了！ - 我没想过要续弦
dialogues.en: - Oh, it did! - I never imagined I would remarry.

dialogues.cn: 没想过真能有个儿子
dialogues.en: That I would have a son.

dialogues.cn: 万一我错了呢？
dialogues.en: What if I was wrong?

dialogues.cn: 陛下 虽然不是白鹿 但也是个大家伙
dialogues.en: It may not be white, Your Grace, but he's a big lad.

dialogues.cn: 陛下
dialogues.en: Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 请用它
dialogues.en: For the kill.

dialogues.cn: 往这刺 陛下
dialogues.en: Strike here, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 陛下 再来一次 往您的左手边一点
dialogues.en: One more time, Your Grace. A bit to your left.

dialogues.cn: 别
dialogues.en: No.

dialogues.cn: 来吧 王子乖乖 让陛下消停一会
dialogues.en: Come, sweet prince. Let's give Her Grace some peace.

dialogues.cn: 殿下享受这次狩猎么？
dialogues.en: Did you enjoy the hunt, Your Grace?

dialogues.cn: 还行吧
dialogues.en: Well enough.

dialogues.cn: 我外孙过得好吗？
dialogues.en: How fared my grandson?

dialogues.cn: 兰尼斯特夫人和雷德温夫人可喜欢他了
dialogues.en: The ladies Lannister and Redwyne were quite taken with him.

dialogues.cn: 应该的
dialogues.en: As they should be.

dialogues.cn: 他是王国的未来
dialogues.en: He's the future of the realm.

dialogues.cn: 你自己也看到这次庆典的规模了
dialogues.en: You yourself witnessed the scale of the celebration

dialogues.cn: 大家多团结
dialogues.en: how it's united the men.

dialogues.cn: 你给国王生下儿子时
dialogues.en: When you bore the King a son

dialogues.cn: 十五年的疑虑都烟消云散了
dialogues.en: you ended 15 years of uncertainty and doubt.

dialogues.cn: 伊耿 人如其名 生来就是要统治七国的
dialogues.en: Aegon, like his namesake, was born to rule the Seven Kingdoms.

dialogues.cn: 如果韦赛里斯把他立为王储 举国会为他欢庆
dialogues.en: If Viserys were to name him heir, the realm would fete him for it.

dialogues.cn: 你不欢喜么？
dialogues.en: Does this not please you?

dialogues.cn: 你不希望儿子能当上国王么？
dialogues.en: Do you not want your son to be king?

dialogues.cn: 哪个母亲不想啊？
dialogues.en: What mother wouldn't?

dialogues.cn: 你不能无视确凿的事实
dialogues.en: You mustn't ignore the certain truth

dialogues.cn: 如果雷妮拉取代了伊耿称王
dialogues.en: that if Rhaenyra were to step over Aegon to ascend the throne

dialogues.cn: 王国就会分崩离析
dialogues.en: the realm would tear itself apart.

dialogues.cn: 各大家族已经向她宣誓效忠了 咱们家也一样
dialogues.en: They all swore obeisance to her, our house among them.

dialogues.cn: 那是伊耿出生之前
dialogues.en: That was before Aegon.

dialogues.cn: 雷妮拉会是个好女王
dialogues.en: Rhaenyra will be a good Queen.

dialogues.cn: 她就算是杰赫里斯再世也没用的
dialogues.en: It wouldn't matter if she were Jaehaerys himself born again.

dialogues.cn: 雷妮拉是女人
dialogues.en: Rhaenyra is a woman.

dialogues.cn: 你把我儿子当什么？
dialogues.en: What of my son?

dialogues.cn: 你想让我把他抚养成一个篡夺姐姐的天赐权利的人么？
dialogues.en: Would you have me raise a man to steal his own sister's birthright?

dialogues.cn: 伊耿才是被夺权的那个
dialogues.en: It is Aegon that's being robbed.

dialogues.cn: 他是国王的长子
dialogues.en: He's the firstborn son of the King.

dialogues.cn: 否认他对铁王座的继承权
dialogues.en: To deny that he is heir to the throne

dialogues.cn: 就是蔑视诸神和世人的律法
dialogues.en: is to assail the laws of gods and men.

dialogues.cn: 我们的前路并不确定 但结局很明确
dialogues.en: The road ahead is uncertain, but the end is clear.

dialogues.cn: 伊耿会成为国王
dialogues.en: Aegon will be King.

dialogues.cn: 你要引导韦赛里斯恢复理智
dialogues.en: You must guide Viserys towards reason.

dialogues.cn: 他自己想不明白的
dialogues.en: He'll never find it on his own.

dialogues.cn: 你还好么 夫君？
dialogues.en: How are you feeling, husband?

dialogues.cn: 诸神在惩罚我过分享受了
dialogues.en: The gods have punished me for my indulgences.

dialogues.cn: - 至少说明确实是好酒 - 好过头了
dialogues.en: - At least the wine was good. - Too good.

dialogues.cn: 我希望咱们能讨论些事情
dialogues.en: I was hoping we might discuss something.

dialogues.cn: 雷妮拉的事么？
dialogues.en: Rhaenyra?

dialogues.cn: 我觉得她不喜欢杰森·兰尼斯特作陪
dialogues.en: I do not think she enjoyed Jason Lannister's company.

dialogues.cn: 简直气死了
dialogues.en: She is cross.

dialogues.cn: 我警告过你啦
dialogues.en: I warned you that she would be.

dialogues.cn: 雷妮拉到岁数了
dialogues.en: Rhaenyra has come of age.

dialogues.cn: 她必须嫁给一位大领主 愿意敬她 护她
dialogues.en: She must needs marry a high lord who will honor her, defend her

dialogues.cn: 作为王夫服侍她
dialogues.en: and serve her as king consort.

dialogues.cn: 她想不想结婚根本不是重点
dialogues.en: Her wishes in this matter are irrelevant.

dialogues.cn: 我相信她会结婚的 陛下
dialogues.en: I do believe that Rhaenyra will marry, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 但得让她相信那是她自己的选择
dialogues.en: But she must believe it is her choice to do so.

dialogues.cn: - 这是什么？ - 一封信
dialogues.en: - What's this? - A letter.

dialogues.cn: 魏蒙德·瓦列利安寄来的
dialogues.en: From Vaemond Velaryon.

dialogues.cn: - 海蛇的弟弟？ - 对
dialogues.en: - The Sea Snake's brother? - Yes.

dialogues.cn: 他和残余的部队还在石阶列岛作战
dialogues.en: He's fighting in the Stepstones with all the rest of them.

dialogues.cn: 我能看看么？
dialogues.en: May I?

dialogues.cn: 科利斯大人和戴蒙王子快输了
dialogues.en: Lord Corlys and Prince Daemon are losing their war.

dialogues.cn: 据说战事非常不利
dialogues.en: Badly, by all accounts.

dialogues.cn: 这是在请求援助
dialogues.en: This is a plea for aid.

dialogues.cn: 那为何不援助呢？
dialogues.en: Then why not send it?

dialogues.cn: 因为发动战争的是两个异见者
dialogues.en: Because it is a war started by two malcontents

dialogues.cn: 他们对我的决策心怀不满
dialogues.en: unhappy with decisions I made.

dialogues.cn: 如果我现在给戴蒙和科利斯提供援军
dialogues.en: If I now provide Daemon and Corlys succor

dialogues.cn: 大家会怎么看待我这个国王？
dialogues.en: what will that say of their King?

dialogues.cn: 或许会说国王是个好人 很爱自己的弟弟
dialogues.en: Perhaps that he is a good man who loves his brother.

dialogues.cn: 嗯 你要是真这么想 亲爱的
dialogues.en: Well, if you truly believe that, my dear

dialogues.cn: 只能说明你心胸宽广
dialogues.en: then you possess a generous spirit.

dialogues.cn: 那你相信什么呢 韦赛里斯？
dialogues.en: What do you believe, Viserys?

dialogues.cn: 我觉得我就是个永远无法
dialogues.en: That I am forever doomed to anger one person

dialogues.cn: 取悦所有人的倒霉蛋
dialogues.en: in the pleasing of another.

dialogues.cn: 那我问个更简单的问题？
dialogues.en: Then I pose a simpler question.

dialogues.cn: 哪样更利于王国的稳定 是放任螃蟹喂食者壮大实力
dialogues.en: Is it better for the realm if the Crabfeeder thrives

dialogues.cn: 还是把他斩草除根？
dialogues.en: or is vanquished?

dialogues.cn: 即刻动身前往矮石 亚当爵士
dialogues.en: Make haste to Dwarfstone, Ser Addam.

dialogues.cn: 务必亲手将它交给戴蒙王子
dialogues.en: Hand-deliver this to Prince Daemon yourself.

dialogues.cn: 立刻去办 陛下
dialogues.en: At once, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 矮石？
dialogues.en: Dwarfstone?

dialogues.cn: 我给戴蒙送去消息 援兵正驶往石阶列岛
dialogues.en: I'm sending word to Daemon. Aid is sailing to the Stepstones.

dialogues.cn: - 他有要求增援吗？ - 他宁愿战死
dialogues.en: - Did he make call for help? - He would sooner die.

dialogues.cn: 但是他的国王不允许那样
dialogues.en: But his King does not mean to allow that.

dialogues.cn: 你不觉得我的决定很正确吗？
dialogues.en: Do you not think my decision correct?

dialogues.cn: 正如我经常被提醒的那样 这和我的想法并无关系
dialogues.en: It is no consequence to what I think, as I'm often reminded.

dialogues.cn: 戴蒙就如深扎在我血肉里的刺
dialogues.en: Daemon is thorn enough in my flesh.

dialogues.cn: 你一定要学他吗？
dialogues.en: Will you insist on taking after him?

dialogues.cn: 每件事都必须争斗一番吗？
dialogues.en: Must everything be a battle?

dialogues.cn: 如果你指的是你想把我嫁到凯岩城……
dialogues.en: If you refer to your attempt to marry me off to Casterly Rock...

dialogues.cn: 我很抱歉 雷妮拉
dialogues.en: I am sorry, Rhaenyra.

dialogues.cn: 我试着去帮你 你领情吗？
dialogues.en: I was trying to help you. Will you not be helped?

dialogues.cn: 为什么在你身上的每一次努力都会遭到你的殊死抵抗？
dialogues.en: Why must every effort on your behalf be resisted as if to the death?

dialogues.cn: 因为你想换掉我
dialogues.en: Because you mean to replace me.

dialogues.cn: 让阿莉森·海塔尔的儿子换掉我 他是你一直梦寐以求的男丁
dialogues.en: With Alicent Hightower's son. The boy you always wanted.

dialogues.cn: 你现在已经拥他在手 我对你已经全然没有利用价值了
dialogues.en: You have him in hand now, you have no further use for me.

dialogues.cn: 你大可以把我兜售个好价钱
dialogues.en: You might as well peddle me for what you can.

dialogues.cn: 换一座山上的堡垒 一支庞大的舰队
dialogues.en: A mountain stronghold or a fleet of ships.

dialogues.cn: 你误解我了 雷妮拉
dialogues.en: You have misjudged me, Rhaenyra.

dialogues.cn: 人尽皆知
dialogues.en: All know it.

dialogues.cn: 杰森·兰尼斯特知道这事
dialogues.en: Jason Lannister knows it.

dialogues.cn: 你亲口说的
dialogues.en: You said it yourself.

dialogues.cn: 全境的领主们像秃鹫一样聚集到我的尸体上
dialogues.en: The lords of the realm gather like vultures to a carcass

dialogues.cn: 想要饱餐一顿
dialogues.en: hoping to feast on my bones.

dialogues.cn: 作为统治者我们确实需要为了利益来联姻
dialogues.en: It is true that as rulers we must marry for advantage

dialogues.cn: 去建立联盟增强实力
dialogues.en: to forge alliances and bolster our strength.

dialogues.cn: 你也一直深谙这点
dialogues.en: You have always understood this.

dialogues.cn: 我和你母亲订下婚事 那时才十……
dialogues.en: I myself was promised to your mother when I was ten...

dialogues.cn: 十七岁的年纪
dialogues.en: Ten-and-seven years of age.

dialogues.cn: 谷地有一支军队能与北境抗衡
dialogues.en: The Vale had an army to rival the North.

dialogues.cn: 我记事起就一直听那个故事了
dialogues.en: I've heard that story since I've had ears to.

dialogues.cn: 我深爱她
dialogues.en: I loved her.

dialogues.cn: 她让我成为了真正的男人
dialogues.en: She made a man of me.

dialogues.cn: 我不想让其他人取代你 孩子
dialogues.en: I do not seek to replace you, child.

dialogues.cn: 这几年你一直很孤独
dialogues.en: You've been much alone these last few years

dialogues.cn: 孤独又易怒
dialogues.en: alone and angry.

dialogues.cn: 我不会长生不老
dialogues.en: I will not live forever.

dialogues.cn: 我希望看到你生活富足 幸福美满
dialogues.en: I wish to see you contented. Happy, even.

dialogues.cn: - 你觉得靠一个男人能办到？ - 是家庭
dialogues.en: - You think a man will do it? - A family.

dialogues.cn: - 我曾有过家庭 - 你想要我做什么？
dialogues.en: - I had a family. - What would you have me do?

dialogues.cn: 如果真的是为了利益考虑 你当初就该迎娶兰娜尔·瓦列利安！
dialogues.en: If it was for advantage, you would have wed Laena Velaryon!

dialogues.cn: 你说的没错
dialogues.en: That is true enough.

dialogues.cn: 你必须结婚
dialogues.en: You must marry.

dialogues.cn: 加强你的继承人地位
dialogues.en: Strengthen your own claim.

dialogues.cn: 巩固你的继承权 赶紧生孩子
dialogues.en: Shore up your succession. Multiply.

dialogues.cn: 至于你的良配……
dialogues.en: As to your match...

dialogues.cn: 你自己选
dialogues.en: make it yourself.

dialogues.cn: 找到他
dialogues.en: Search him out.

dialogues.cn: 找一个你喜欢的
dialogues.en: Find one that pleases you.

dialogues.cn: 就像我那样
dialogues.en: As I did.

dialogues.cn: 雷妮拉
dialogues.en: Rhaenyra.

dialogues.cn: 我的确动摇过
dialogues.en: I did waver.

dialogues.cn: 有那么一阵
dialogues.en: At one time.

dialogues.cn: 但我现在以你母亲的名义向你发誓
dialogues.en: But I swear to you now, on your mother's memory

dialogues.cn: 你不会被取代
dialogues.en: you will not be supplanted.

dialogues.cn: 我们有16艘 或许18艘适航的船只
dialogues.en: We have 16, perhaps 18, seaworthy ships.

dialogues.cn: 700名步兵 约60名骑士
dialogues.en: 700 foot, some 60 knights.

dialogues.cn: 粮草消耗很快
dialogues.en: Our food quickly dwindles

dialogues.cn: 尽管能从海中补充些渔获
dialogues.en: save for what we can fish from the sea.

dialogues.cn: 我想还能坚持两周
dialogues.en: I would say we have a fortnight

dialogues.cn: 也许在严格的配给管理下能再久些
dialogues.en: mayhaps a bit longer with strict rationing.

dialogues.cn: 我已经求助潮头岛派更多的船
dialogues.en: I've made call for Driftmark to send more ships

dialogues.cn: 但还要几周才能到
dialogues.en: but they will be weeks away.

dialogues.cn: 我军的势头正在衰弱 三城同盟会知道这点
dialogues.en: We are faltering and the Triarchy knows it.

dialogues.cn: 我们必须加紧进攻 继续派出龙
dialogues.en: We must press the attack. Continue sending the dragons.

dialogues.cn: 这是徒劳的 父亲
dialogues.en: It's pointless, Father.

dialogues.cn: 螃蟹喂食者把住了咽喉要道
dialogues.en: The Crabfeeder's created a chokepoint here

dialogues.cn: 就在这些沙丘后方
dialogues.en: beyond these dunes.

dialogues.cn: 弓箭手占据高地 步兵占据平地
dialogues.en: Archers hold the high positions, foot soldiers hold the ground.

dialogues.cn: 我们一次又一次地在龙背上扫射
dialogues.en: We strafe them on dragonback again and again

dialogues.cn: 但他们只是撤退到洞穴里
dialogues.en: but they just retreat within the caves.

dialogues.cn: 龙们可以在血石上盘旋 直到它们从天上下来
dialogues.en: Dragons can circle Bloodstone until they fall out of the sky.

dialogues.cn: 螃蟹喂食者和他的人没有理由离开洞穴
dialogues.en: The Crabfeeder and his men have no reason to leave those caves.

dialogues.cn: 我们必须给他们一个理由
dialogues.en: We must give them one.

dialogues.cn: 一块引诱螃蟹的肉
dialogues.en: An offering of flesh to bait the crab.

dialogues.cn: 谁？
dialogues.en: Who?

dialogues.cn: 龙回来了！
dialogues.en: Dragon returning!

dialogues.cn: 没错 谁？
dialogues.en: Yes, who?

dialogues.cn: 这里有谁愿意欣然赴死？
dialogues.en: Which man here will happily go to his death?

dialogues.cn: 侄儿 让我看看哪个骑士会慷慨下地狱？
dialogues.en: Show me the knight who will march into that hellpit

dialogues.cn: 我让你看看疯子是什么样子
dialogues.en: nephew, and I will show you a madman.

dialogues.cn: - 戴蒙 - 戴蒙是我们失败的原因
dialogues.en: - Daemon. - Daemon is why we are losing.

dialogues.cn: 他至少还在打仗
dialogues.en: He at least is fighting this war.

dialogues.cn: 叔叔 你在这个议会中扮演了什么角色？
dialogues.en: What role have you played in this council, Uncle?

dialogues.cn: - 除了当抱怨大臣 还有吗？ - 够了 兰尼诺
dialogues.en: - Other than master of complaints? - Enough, Laenor.

dialogues.cn: 如果君临不支援戴蒙
dialogues.en: If King's Landing will not support Daemon

dialogues.cn: 我们为什么要这样做？
dialogues.en: why should any of us?

dialogues.cn: 管你是不是我的血亲 魏蒙德 我不会让你煽动叛乱
dialogues.en: Blood or no, Vaemond, I will not have you stoke mutiny.

dialogues.cn: 如果你不尽力去掌控这场战争 大人
dialogues.en: If you do not seize control of this war, my lord

dialogues.cn: 我们所有人早晚会葬身蟹腹
dialogues.en: the crabs will soon dine on all of us.

dialogues.cn: 戴蒙王子
dialogues.en: Prince Daemon.

dialogues.cn: 我带来了韦塞里斯·坦格利安一世陛下
dialogues.en: I bring word from His Grace, Viserys Targaryen First of His Name,

dialogues.cn: 安达尔人 洛伊拿人和先民的国王
dialogues.en: King of the Andals, the Rhoynar and the First Men

dialogues.cn: 七国统治者暨全境守护者的旨意
dialogues.en: Lord of the Seven Kingdoms, and Protector of the Realm.

dialogues.cn: 够了！
dialogues.en: That's enough!

dialogues.cn: 停下！
dialogues.en: Stop!

dialogues.cn: 弟弟……
dialogues.en: Brother...

dialogues.cn: 我已下令派出十艘船
dialogues.en: I have ordered ten ships

dialogues.cn: 以及2000兵力 即刻从君临出发
dialogues.en: and 2,000 men to set sail from King's Landing

dialogues.cn: 为石阶列岛的战斗出力
dialogues.en: to join the effort in the Stepstones.

dialogues.cn: 尽管机缘使我们彼此疏远
dialogues.en: Though time and circumstance have seen us estranged

dialogues.cn: 要知道 我不希望看到你的行动失败
dialogues.en: know that it is not my desire to see you fail in your course.

dialogues.cn: 相反 我希望这次援助将带来
dialogues.en: It is instead my hope that this aid will deliver the victory

dialogues.cn: 迄今为止我们未能取得的胜利
dialogues.en: that has thus far evaded us.

dialogues.cn: 我将每晚向诸神祈祷你平安归来
dialogues.en: I shall pray nightly to the gods for your safe return.

dialogues.cn: 搭箭
dialogues.en: Nock.

dialogues.cn: 拉弓
dialogues.en: Draw.

dialogues.cn: 放箭！
dialogues.en: Loose!

dialogues.cn: 放箭！
dialogues.en: Loose!

dialogues.cn: 放箭！
dialogues.en: Loose!

dialogues.cn: 放箭！
dialogues.en: Loose!

dialogues.cn: 龙焰！
dialogues.en: Dracarys!

dialogues.cn: 搭箭！
dialogues.en: Nock!

dialogues.cn: 龙来了！
dialogues.en: Dragon!

dialogues.cn: 龙焰！
dialogues.en: Dracarys!

dialogues.cn: 弓箭手！
dialogues.en: Optyssys!

dialogues.cn: 弓箭手！
dialogues.en: Optyssys!

dialogues.cn: ……允许他们投降，否则后果更糟糕
……许多人被蝇虫和老鼠放倒，健康的也是疲惫不堪。
……他们正在猛攻……我们需要人手……
……否则就会全盘皆输，都会死在沙滩上……
魏蒙德·瓦列利安
